title: message_set unknown patch paths silently ignored
description: Message/set update silently drops unrecognized patch paths (comment says permissive). Unlike Space/set and ChatContact/set which reject unknown paths with invalidProperties, message_set lets unknown keys through. A client that sends {deliveryState: 'sent'} (wrong path name, correct intent) gets a 200 with updated containing the msg_id, but nothing changes. RFC 8620 requires invalidArguments for unrecognized patch paths to prevent silent no-ops.
close_reason: Fixed in round 34: body cap, forbidden error, unknown patch paths, description limit
